sources.title: Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023
sources.publisher: Ministry of Electronics and IT (MeitY), Government of India
sources.description: India's standalone data protection law establishing rights of Data Principals and obligations of Data Fiduciaries.

sources.title: Digital Personal Data Protection Rules, 2025
sources.publisher: Ministry of Electronics and IT (MeitY), Government of India
sources.description: Final notified Rules operationalising the DPDP Act, including consent, security, breach notification, and children's data provisions.

sources.title: DPDP Rules 2025 (English text mirror)
sources.description: Clean English-only mirror of the notified DPDP Rules 2025 for easier reading and search.

sources.title: PIB Press Release — DPDP Rules 2025 Notification
sources.publisher: Press Information Bureau, Government of India
sources.description: Official government summary of the notified Rules and phased implementation timeline.

sources.title: DSCI — DPDP Rules 2025 (Rule-to-Section Index)
sources.description: Structured summary mapping each Rule to its corresponding Act Section — useful cross-reference index.

sources.title: DLA Piper — Data Protection Laws of the World (India)
sources.description: Authoritative law-firm guide to India's data protection framework for cross-checking interpretation.

implementation_phases.description: Data Protection Board of India established
All other substantive compliance obligations become effective
